selected_goal: Add summary buckets and ranked review candidates for mark_scheme_text foreign-label failures.
why_this_now: Iteration 4 reduced false positives but left 22 live foreign-label records. Reviewers need deterministic prioritization similar to suspicious crop candidates.
repo_evidence: src/exam_bank/audit.py already has the failure evidence needed to summarize by paper and label count.
The previous cycle improved suspicious crop findings with review candidates; this should match that pattern.
acceptance_criteria: The summary includes counts by foreign label and top paper buckets.
The audit report includes mark_scheme_text_foreign_label_review_candidates sorted by number of labels, number of line examples, paper, and question number.
test_expectations: Extend tests/test_audit.py to assert summary and review candidates for the foreign-label fixture.
implementation_boundaries: Do not add another CLI command.
rollback_plan: Remove the summary/review-candidate fields and assertions.
done_when: Tests pass and the live audit has ranked text-label review candidates.
